context: Evaluates the execution of the full Rails TDD Loop workflow: context loading, TDD hard-gates (test first, run fail), implementation proposal, minimal implementation, and post-implementation quality checks.

checklist.name: Phase 1: Context Loading
checklist.description: The agent explicitly loads project context (schema, models, etc.) before writing the spec.

checklist.name: HARD GATE: Test Written First
checklist.description: The agent writes the RSpec test for `#discounted_price` BEFORE any implementation code.

checklist.name: HARD GATE: Verified Failure
checklist.description: The agent runs the spec and explicitly verifies it fails for the correct reason (e.g., `undefined method`).

checklist.name: Phase 2: Implementation Proposal
checklist.description: The agent proposes the implementation strategy in plain language before writing the code.

checklist.name: Phase 2: Minimal Implementation
checklist.description: The implementation code is the minimal required to pass the test and follows Rails conventions.

checklist.name: Phase 4: YARD Documentation
checklist.description: The implementation includes proper YARD documentation (@param, @return) for the new method.

checklist.name: Phase 4: Self-Review
checklist.description: The agent performs a self-review of the changes using the `rails-code-review` skill or checklist.

checklist.name: Phase 4: Quality Checks
checklist.description: The agent mentions or executes linters (rubocop) or the full test suite after implementation.
